# Medicare California - Free Medicare Guidance for Californians

> Free, licensed Medicare guidance for California seniors and their families. Bilingual (English and Spanish). Family-owned agency. Trusted by 2,000+ families since 2009.

## About Us

Medicare California (medicare-california.com) is operated by Susana Marcos Insurance, a California-licensed, family-owned insurance agency specializing exclusively in Medicare. Founded by Susana Marcos (JD, MBA) and her daughter Alejandra Brizuela Marcos, the agency has helped over 2,000 California families find the right Medicare plan over 15+ years.

We are independent agents, meaning we represent multiple insurance carriers and are not captive to any single company. Our service is always free to consumers. Insurance carriers compensate us directly, so there is never a cost or obligation to clients.

## What We Do

- Free Medicare plan comparisons for California residents
- Medicare Advantage (Part C) enrollment
- Medigap (Medicare Supplement) enrollment
- Part D Prescription Drug plan enrollment
- Special Needs Plans (SNP) enrollment
- Guidance on all enrollment periods: IEP, AEP, OEP, and SEP
- Year-round support and plan reviews
- Help with Medicare for people turning 65, retiring, or losing employer coverage

## Insurance Carriers We Work With

UnitedHealthcare, Humana, Aetna, Anthem Blue Cross, Blue Shield of California, Kaiser Permanente, SCAN Health Plan, Wellcare, Cigna, and other carriers available in California. Carrier availability varies by county and ZIP code.

## Service Area

We serve all 58 counties in California, including major metro areas: Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco, Sacramento, San Jose, Riverside, Orange County, Fresno, Long Beach, Bakersfield, and all rural areas. Plan availability varies by ZIP code and county.

We also serve Medicare beneficiaries in Florida, Texas, Arizona, Nevada, Utah, Idaho, and Oregon.

## Languages

English and Spanish (fully bilingual team). Our Spanish-language site is https://beneficiosmedicare.com

## Contact

- Phone: (310) 597-9142
- Email: alejamedicare@gmail.com
- English website: https://medicare-california.com
- Spanish website: https://beneficiosmedicare.com

## Key People

- Susana Marcos: Founder and Principal Agent. Former attorney from Argentina. Licensed in 8 states. AHIP Certified annually. JD, MBA.
- Alejandra Brizuela Marcos: Licensed Agent and Partner. Licensed in California. AHIP Certified annually. Focused on making Medicare accessible to Spanish-speaking communities.

## Licensing and Credentials

- California Department of Insurance licensed (Life and Health)
- AHIP (America's Health Insurance Plans) certified annually
- Contracted with all major carriers available in California
- Licensed in 8 states: California, Florida, Texas, Arizona, Nevada, Utah, Idaho, Oregon

## Cost

Our service is completely free to consumers. We never charge fees. Insurance carriers compensate us directly. There is no cost, no obligation, and no pressure.

## Common Questions We Answer

- What Medicare plans are available in my California ZIP code?
- What is the difference between Medicare Advantage and Medigap in California?
- When is Medicare open enrollment? (AEP: October 15 to December 7; OEP: January 1 to March 31)
- How do I enroll in Medicare when I turn 65?
- Which Medicare plans cover my medications?
- Do I need a Medicare supplement plan?
- Can I change my Medicare plan outside of open enrollment?
- What Medicare Advantage plans include dental, vision, and hearing in California?

## Blog and Resources

We publish California-specific Medicare guides at https://medicare-california.com/blog/ covering enrollment periods, plan comparisons, and practical advice for California seniors.

## Why Choose Us

- Family-owned, not a call center
- Independent agents (we compare plans from all major carriers)
- 15+ years of Medicare expertise
- Fully bilingual (English and Spanish)
- Free service, always
- We help you compare plans based on your doctors, medications, and budget
- Licensed and AHIP-certified
